creator: wblock@wonkity.com
text:
Submitting this as a followup for future readers:

The cure to this problem--a sticky or draggy mouse pointer--is to not 
use AllowEmptyInput Off.  It was a temporary cure to a temporary 
problem, and causes problems of its own now.

The right way to disable autodetection of devices by HAL:

Option "AutoAddDevices" "Off"

Another option is to build xorg-server with the HAL option disabled.
